title: ISO/IEC 42001 Lead Implementer Preparation Training
tagline: Practical preparation for designing, operating, and evidencing an Artificial Intelligence Management System.
description: A LeadAI Academy course for professionals who need to implement ISO/IEC 42001, coordinate an AIMS, and prepare teams for audit-ready AI governance.
targetAudience: AI governance, compliance, privacy, and security leads
Programme managers and transformation leaders responsible for AI delivery
Risk, audit, legal, and internal control teams supporting an AIMS
Product, data, and engineering managers coordinating AI system lifecycle controls
learningOutcomes: Explain how modern AI systems convert data, rules, and model logic into outputs and decisions.
Discuss AI governance as a management discipline that aligns innovation, accountability, risk control, and regulatory readiness.
Recognize the major AI governance and regulatory frameworks shaping organizational expectations.
Describe why ISO/IEC 42001 is a leading reference point for establishing an Artificial Intelligence Management System.
Outline AI-specific security threats and the governance controls needed to manage them.
Summarize the AI governance trifecta of privacy, cybersecurity, and legal oversight.
Define ISO/IEC 42001 considerations for ethics, privacy, security, transparency, and lifecycle governance.
Map ISO/IEC 42001 clauses to the Plan-Do-Check-Act model for continual improvement.
Describe a structured implementation path for establishing, operating, monitoring, and improving an AIMS.
State the role of top management in policy, accountability, resources, and sustained AI governance.
